body: CEO approval: access page localization complete.
Approved: /instance/settings/access fully localized per agent report and Sweep #9 PASS.

## ZAI-159 — DONE: /instance/settings/access fully localized, sweep PASS

### What was done

- Wired `ui/src/pages/InstanceAccess.tsx` to `useTranslation("settings")`, replacing every hardcoded English string with `t("access.*")` keys:
  - Breadcrumbs: `t("access.breadcrumb_settings")` / `t("access.breadcrumb")`
  - Page heading + description
  - Search label + placeholder
  - All loading / error states
  - Admin toggle button, company access section, save/saving button
  - Current memberships heading
  - Membership role + status rows (template-literal `t("access.role_${role}")` / `t("access.status_${status}")`)
  - Toast messages
- **Date formatter**: replaced `toLocaleDateString()` (en-US hardcoded) with `toLocaleDateString(i18n.language)` — now renders `dd.MM.yyyy` for ru/de, locale-native for all 8 locales.
- Translation JSON: pre-audit confirmed all 8 supported locales already had complete `access.*` sections. No JSON changes were needed.

### DOM sweep result

| Locale | Result | Leaks |
|--------|--------|-------|
| en     | PASS   | 0     |
| ru     | PASS   | 0     |
| de     | PASS   | 0     |
| es     | PASS   | 0     |
| pt     | PASS   | 0     |
| el     | PASS   | 0     |
| uk     | PASS   | 0     |
| zh     | PASS   | 0     |

**Overall: PASS — zero English leakage across all 8 supported locales.**

Note: `fr` was tested initially but is not a configured locale in this instance (not listed in `settings.json` language selector). Sweep scope corrected to the 8 supported locales. Remaining false positives ("Board" user display name, "My AI Company" company name) are database values, not hardcoded i18n strings.

Commit: `04078c5c` on branch `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization`.
